title: TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM - 211info
text: MALHEUR COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Identifies and treats tuberculosis (TB) disease. Screens tuberculosis case contacts and provides medical case management for those who test positive. 1108 SW 4th Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm (541) 889-7279 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 889-7279 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: May vary, insurance will be billed if applicable DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Malheur County Services: Case/Care Management * Tuberculosis Tuberculosis Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN APPLICATION ASSISTANCE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME VISITING PROGRAMS PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC SAFETY - CHILD PASSENGER SAFETY SEAT INSPECTIONS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MALHEUR COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT
